Get in touch
008 — The Log

The boring
record.

A timestamped record of what we have shipped, published, and built. No press releases. No hype cycles. Just the log.

Mar 2026
Milestone
Pre-seed round open
Boring Science is actively engaging with investors and strategic partners. Deck available on request.
Mar 2026
Company
Boring Science LLC incorporated
Boring Science LLC formally incorporated on March 4, 2026. Founded by Pritam Kumar Panda and Sasi Jagadeesan to build reproducible, rigorously validated computational biology infrastructure.
Feb 2026
Platform
boringscience.bio v1.0 launched
Full platform website live — packages showcase, evidence registry, science page, and investor relations.
Dec 2025
Publication
bsdock & bsvision preprints submitted
Two platform-grounded manuscripts submitted: bsdock (SE(3)-equivariant GNN docking, Pearson R = 0.88 on PDBbind) and bsvision (physics-constrained medical video diffusion, SSIM = 0.87). Both authored by Panda PK, Jagadeesan SK, Mishra S.
Stay in the loop

Want updates
without the noise?

Follow us on LinkedIn for research updates, or reach out directly.

LinkedIn → inquiries@boringscience.bio
Stop fighting your data. Start doing your science.
Boring Science LLC builds the infrastructure that turns biological noise into structured insight.
